div.head: The Chargé in Costa Rica (Thurston) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
San José, October 24, 1921—9 a.m.
[Received October 25—9:55 a.m.]

div.p: 129. President Acosta last night informed me Royal Bank of Canada volunteers to advance large loan to Government of Costa Rica and to undertake consolidation of foreign and internal debts of the Republic. He conveyed to me the impression that Huete’sCosta Rican Minister of Finance. visit to the United States had been unsatisfactory and that British proposal was found very interesting.
